Class OpenApi31ComponentsImpl

java.lang.Object
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.NodeImpl
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.openapi.v3x.v31.OpenApi31ComponentsImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
Components, Extensible, Node, OpenApiComponents, OpenApiExtensible, OpenApi3xComponents, OpenApi3xExtensible, OpenApi31Components, OpenApi31Extensible, Visitable
